name: Vermont Breakfast Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the apples.
2. Shred the cheddar cheese.
3. In a large pan over medium heat, melt the butter.
4. Add the apples and cover. Cook and stir for 8 minutes or until the apples are almost tender.
5. Stir in brown sugar and apple spice. Cook and stir for 2 more minutes or until the apples are tender and glazed.
6. Meanwhile, cook the sausages in a large skillet. Drain on paper towel.
7. Divide ingredients into halves.
8. For each pizza, cover the crust with 1 1/2 cups cheese.
9. Spread with apples.
10. Bake at 400°F for 5 minutes.
11. Add sausages and 1/2 cup cheese on top.
12. Bake for 5 more minutes.
Note: Make your own apple pie spice by mixing 3 tbsp cinnamon, 1 tbsp nutmeg, and 1 tbsp allspice.
